findings.evidence: The chapter runs two negotiation loops on the same conflict before new movement: weekend-mapping trigger at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:173, rule restatement at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:193, second week-design ask at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:336, and near-duplicate boundary bargaining at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:390 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:418.
findings.problem: Scene causality stalls because the argument resets instead of escalating; chapter energy is spent re-litigating terms that are already known, so the major admission lands later than it should.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress and merge the conflict passes at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:173 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:336 into one continuous escalation that drives directly into the confession at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:362. Keep only boundary lines that change leverage (target trims around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:390, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:414, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:418) and add one concrete forward consequence near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:480 (specific next action, not just verbal understanding).
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter presents one uninterrupted confrontation arc from the first schedule trigger near line 173 to Ravi's admission near line 362, and by the late scene (around line 480) includes one new actionable commitment that is not already in the chapter-14 agreement. FAIL if two separate boundary-negotiation loops remain without new leverage.

findings.evidence: After peak vulnerability at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:434, the text quickly cushions tension with performative casual banter and neighbor-comedy beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:448, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:462, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:476, then closes on summarizing reassurance at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:508.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the chapter defuses emotional danger too quickly after confession, shifting into charm and reflective safety language instead of staying with the interpersonal rawness it has earned.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the cooldown immediately after snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:434 (focus spans around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:444, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:448, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:462, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:476, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:508) so reconciliation remains physically and emotionally awkward before any humor release. Replace abstract closure language with one concrete unresolved cost carried into next chapter.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines in the 444-476 sequence show at least two failed or awkward attempts at normal interaction before a joke lands, and the final beat near line 508 names a concrete unresolved strain (behavioral or practical), not an abstract evaluative summary. FAIL if tonal comfort returns immediately after the confession.

findings.evidence: The boundary exchange shifts into shared procedural diction at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:390, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:404, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:422, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:430; Ravi's calendar/checklist lexicon is reiterated heavily at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:183, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:201, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:362.
findings.problem: Idiolect separation softens under pressure: father and daughter sound too similar in mediation-script phrasing, and the repeated scheduling vocabulary reads as over-literal style-bible token reuse rather than lived speech.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the negotiation lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:390, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:404, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:418, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:422, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:430 to restore spoken asymmetry: Anika's lines should stay age-true, body/school-grounded, and interruption-prone; Ravi's should stay work/procedure-rooted but less repetitively calendar-literal.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised 390-430 exchange, Anika and Ravi can be identified by register alone in every turn, with at least one interruption or self-correction from each and no therapist/legal phrasing that flattens their voices. FAIL if their lines remain interchangeable in syntax and rhythm.

findings.evidence: The same hinge construction (clause + explicit 'then' pivot) recurs as a chapter-level tic at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:19, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:55, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:73, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:211, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:233, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:316, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:448, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:506.
findings.problem: Recurring sentence formula flattens rhythm and signals autopilot prose rather than controlled variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the repeated-pivot lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:19, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:55, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:211, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:316, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:448 with varied sentence architecture (subordination, interruption, or standalone beats) while preserving event order.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than two of the cited lines retain the explicit 'then' hinge and at least three cited lines use clearly different sentence shapes. FAIL if the clause-plus-then construction still dominates those beats.

findings.evidence: Extended exterior-only stretches exceed the 10-paragraph threshold before interiority returns: lunch/social run from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:278 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:316, and post-confession errand run from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:462 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:490.
findings.problem: Interiority drop-out: close-third distance loosens into screenplay-like external coverage for too long, weakening emotional continuity with Anika's focal perspective.
findings.rewrite_direction: Inject focalized internal beats into the cited spans, especially around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:294, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:314, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:468, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:484, tying each beat to immediate dialogue/action rather than retrospective summary.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines 278-316 include at least three explicit internal-experience beats (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment) and revised lines 462-490 include at least two, each anchored to the moment's action. FAIL if either span still runs 10+ consecutive paragraphs without interiority.

summary: Chapter continuity and tense stay consistent with canon, and the core confession beat is present, but quality remains below pass due to structural looped conflict, high-severity sanitization in the cooldown, dialogue register flattening, repeated sentence formulas, and two long interiority dropouts.
